headline: Foundayo Trial Results Recast Eli Lilly Story On GLP1 Safety And Growth
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) reported positive phase 3 ACHIEVE-4 results for its once-daily oral GLP-1 therapy Foundayo (orforglipron) in at-risk type 2 diabetes patients. The trial showed reductions in body weight and blood sugar, and Foundayo matched or surpassed insulin glargine on cardiovascular outcomes. No liver safety signal was observed, addressing recent FDA concerns and the agency's request for additional safety data. Eli Lilly plans an imminent FDA submission for expanded use of Foundayo,...
